why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:award_stats must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundAwardStatsPacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from non-empty Stat registry entry decoding, stat semantics, UI/stat screen behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_award_stats_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayAwardStatsClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound award_stats surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00, minecraft:add_entity / 0x01, and minecraft:animate / 0x02, but not minecraft:award_stats / 0x03.

play_clientbound_award_stats.official_fixture: official ClientboundAwardStatsPacket empty Object2IntOpenHashMap<Stat<?>> fixture; no initialized Minecraft/game state or stat registry entries
play_clientbound_award_stats.official_body_shape: Object2IntMap<Stat<?>> encoded as VarInt count, then per entry Stat.STREAM_CODEC key followed by VarInt value; empty fixture encodes only count 0

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundAwardStatsPacket(Object2IntMap<Stat<?>>), ClientboundAwardStatsPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ClientboundAwardStatsPacket.STAT_VALUES_STREAM_CODEC, Stat.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.VAR_INT, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleAwardStats(ClientboundAwardStatsPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound award_stats dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter, 0x01 add_entity, and 0x02 animate, but not official packet id 0x03 award_stats.
Current Packet enum has no Play award_stats packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 empty-stats body fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayAwardStatsClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
